Headline: Orange Line and Green Line Service Delayed at Roosevelt
ShortDescription: Orange Line and Green Line trains are standing at Roosevelt due to signal problem.  Crews working to restore service.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Orange Line and Green Line trains are standing at Roosevelt due to signal problem. 

At this time, also consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes, or using buses to other rail lines.

Shuttle buses are requested as follows:

  • Green Line Shuttle Buses are requested to provide connected service from Adams to 35th.
  • Orange Line Shuttle Buses are requested to provide connected service from Midway to Library.

Personnel are working to restore service. Allow extra travel time.
